aeo_readiness.summary: Briggs AC Services has a strong foundation for AEO with good content and schema usage, but lacks conversational content and authority signals to ensure AI models cite them as a top choice.
quick_wins: Expand FAQ content with more detailed, conversational answers.
Incorporate structured data for HowTo guides related to common HVAC issues.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite having FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or troubleshooting tasks.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and authority signals makes AI models less likely to cite them.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services or detailed troubleshooting advice.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding structured data for FAQs and HowTo guides.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Be the HVAC authority AI models trust and recommend.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and authority signals, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their high GBP rating and strong NAP consistency show they are trusted locally, but AI models need more detailed, structured content to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement conversational content, enhance schema markup, and showcase authority signals to make Briggs AC Services the top choice for AI-driven queries.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—waiting means losing ground in the new search landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for Briggs AC Services
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make Briggs AC Services the top choice for AI-driven HVAC queries.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your content and schema for AI search.
